channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Java (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Java nel periodo weekly.

item.title: ☕ AnythingForTheTrustRank/Jenny-Mod-All-Versions (380 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: AnythingForTheTrustRank

📝 Repository: AnythingForTheTrustRank/Jenny-Mod-All-Versions

📄 Descrizione: Jenny Mod Minecraft: Interactive virtual companion system. Jenny, Ellie, Bia social interactions, gift giving, friendship levels. Minecraft Java 1.12.2, Bedrock Edition addon, MCPE compatibility. Custom character animations, NPC dialogue, house building, social simulator, quests.

⭐ Stelle: 380

🍴 Forks: 1

💻 Linguaggio: Java

🏷️ Topics: 1-12-2-mod forge-mod forgemc-mod java-edition jenny-mod jenny-mod-2026 jenny-mod-all-versions jenny-mod-minecraft-download jennybot jennymod jennymod-2026 jennymod-minecraft mcmod minecraft minecraft-jenny-mod minecraft-jenny-mod-2026 minecraft-mod minecraftjennymod minecraftjennymod-2026

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-13T15:17:32Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-15T09:48:46Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: ☕ ClouGence/open-cdm (150 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ClouGence

📝 Repository: ClouGence/open-cdm

📄 Descrizione: A free and open-source database management tool, suitable for team use. It offers capabilities such as access control, data anonymization, SQL auditing, CI/CD, and supports cross-regional deployment.

⭐ Stelle: 150

🍴 Forks: 39

💻 Linguaggio: Java

item.title: ☕ zerozshare/OpenFriendMod (45 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: zerozshare

📝 Repository: zerozshare/OpenFriendMod

📄 Descrizione: Fabric client mod that backports the Minecraft Java Edition Friends List (snapshot 26.2+) to MC 1.16.5 – 1.21.11. Gamertag search, friend requests, in-game Open to Friends, Friends-List-driven Join. 30 builds, no Fabric API dependency.

⭐ Stelle: 45

🍴 Forks: 2

💻 Linguaggio: Java

🏷️ Topics: fabric fabricmc fabricmc-mod friends-list friendslist minecraft minecraft-mod openfriend snapshot-26-2 xbox-live zshare

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-18T20:02:53Z

item.title: ☕ lywnl/ai-app-generation (34 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: lywnl

📝 Repository: lywnl/ai-app-generation

📄 Descrizione: 基于Spring Boot 3 + LangChain4j的AI零代码应用生成平台。通过用户输入自然语言，由AI Agent 自动执行多源上下文增强、代码生成、项目构建的完整工作流，可一键部署为可访问的Web应用。并结合多级缓存、异步处理、安全护轨等多种优化策略，保证系统的高性能与稳定性

⭐ Stelle: 34

🍴 Forks: 2

item.description:

item.title: ☕ Sam-Richard-007/Smart-GenAI-Powered-JMeter (10 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Sam-Richard-007

📝 Repository: Sam-Richard-007/Smart-GenAI-Powered-JMeter

📄 Descrizione: AI-assisted correlation and test-plan editing live, inside JMeter. Load any JMX, run the test, and let the plugin's Smart Correlation Listener capture every response. Then talk to AI in natural language to add extractors, JSR223 scripts, assertions, timers applied directly to your JMeter tree with a confirmation dialog before anything is change

⭐ Stelle: 10

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Java

🏷️ Topics: jmeter jmeter-plugin jmeter-scripting

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-20T16:32:51Z
